name: Checkly
description: Monitor Checkly synthetic tests and alert channels for endpoint availability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Checkly at https://app.checklyhq.com
2. Go to User Settings -> API Keys -> Create API key
3. Copy the API key (shown only once)
4. Go to Account Settings -> General to find your Account ID
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Checkly User Settings -> API Keys -> Create API key

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Checkly Account Settings -> General (bottom of page)

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Checkly synthetic checks are configured and monitoring endpoints

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Checkly alert channels are configured to receive failure notifications
